item.title: 巴拿马运河客货运量超预期增长 特朗普贸易战中逆势而上
item.description: 巴拿马运河收入出现意外增长，其自身此前预测认为特朗普的贸易战将导致运量下降，如今这一预测被打破。【原文：The Panama Canal is reporting an unexpected jump in revenue, confounding its own forecasts that Donald Trump’s trade wars would cause traffic to drop.】

item.title: 全球波动加剧，央行誓言支持人民币汇率稳定
item.description: 中国人民银行行长重申将保持人民币汇率稳定的承诺，并誓言要使中国金融市场免受中东战争引发的波动影响。【原文：China’s central bank governor reiterated a pledge to keep the yuan stable and vowed to insulate the nation’s financial markets from volatility spurred by the war in the Middle East.】

item.title: 普氏能源资讯：中东石油定价机制调整引发交易商忧虑
item.description: 本周中东基准原油价格大幅上涨，因伊朗战争引发的规则变更影响了关键定价窗口，导致市场出现错位，引发交易商的抱怨。【原文：Middle Eastern benchmark crude oil prices have surged this week, as an Iran-war driven rule change affecting a key pricing window resulted in market dislocations that have drawn complaints from traders.】

item.title: 朗盛股价暴跌，资产出售失败致垃圾级评级风险升高
item.description: 德国化工巨头朗盛集团因未能完成资产出售，股价跌至2009年以来最低点，市场担忧该公司可能失去投资级信用评级。【原文：Lanxess AG shares fell to their lowest since 2009 after the German chemicals company failed to complete an asset sale, raising concerns it could lose its investment-grade credit rating.】

item.title: 债券价格下跌，因战争使欧洲央行加息从边缘化转向完全定价
item.description: 一周前，押注欧洲央行加息的人还处于孤立的逆势立场。如今，随着伊朗战争威胁加剧通胀，这种交易已成为市场共识。【原文：A week ago, anyone betting on a European Central Bank interest-rate hike was staking out a lonely, contrarian position. Now, with the Iran war threatening to stoke inflation, the trade is the consensus.】

item.title: Indonesia Says Pakistan, UAE Back Prabowo Bid for Iran Mediation
item.description: 印尼总统普拉博沃·苏比安托提出在伊朗冲突中进行调解，巴基斯坦和阿拉伯联合酋长国等国对此表示支持，一位官员如是说。【原文：Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto’s offer to mediate in the Iran conflict has backing from countries including Pakistan and the United Arab Emirates, an official said.】

item.title: 导弹拦截器短缺引发全球各国首都忧虑
item.description: 随着无人机和导弹瞄准乌克兰及海湾地区的城市和关键基础设施，世界各国正争相确保获得所需的防空拦截器，以阻止这些袭击。【原文：As drones and missiles target cities and critical infrastructure in Ukraine and the Gulf, the world is scrambling to secure supplies of the air defense interceptors needed to stop them.】

item.title: 意外薪资飙升令捷克降息预期再遭打击
item.description: 捷克工资增长在第四季度意外加速，这给央行今年降息的可能性再添阻力。【原文：Czech wage growth unexpectedly accelerated in the fourth quarter, dealing a fresh blow to chances that the central bank will be able to cut interest rates this year.】

item.title: 美国汽油零售价格升至2024年以来最高水平
item.description: 美国汽油零售价格攀升至2024年9月以来的最高水平，中东地区冲突导致该地区能源供应中断。【原文：US gasoline pump prices advanced to the highest level since September 2024, as the conflict in the Middle East disrupts energy supplies from the region.】

item.title: 关于霍尔木兹海峡周边海上混乱局势的更多报道
item.description:
受影响的远不止石油。

【原文：

It's more than just oil that's being affected.

】

item.title: 波斯湾海域混乱局势深度解析（播客）
item.description: 随着伊朗战事爆发，油价正持续飙升。这既源于石油能源基础设施的破坏，也因霍尔木兹海峡的运输通道面临阻塞风险。但这条关键水道承载的远不止石油——包括金属和化肥原料在内的众多商品运输都可能受限。 对航运公司而言，问题不仅在于暴力冲突本身带来的风险，更在于货物如何顺利进港。【原文：With war breaking out in Iran, the price of oil is surging, in part due to the destruction of oil energy infrastructure, but also the ability of anything to get through the Strait of Hormuz. But it’s not just oil that moves through this key waterway — there are plenty of other goods, including metals and ingredients for fertilizer getting potentially constrained. It’s also not just the risk of violence itself that’s an issue for shipping companies, there’s also the question of how cargoes get in】

item.title: 随着战火蔓延，滞留迪拜的黄金正以折扣价出售
item.description: 由于中东战争导致航班停飞，阻碍了供应商将黄金运出这个重要贸易枢纽的能力，迪拜的黄金正以大幅折扣价出售。【原文：Gold is being offered at a steep discount in Dubai, as the war in the Middle East grounds flights and hampers suppliers’ ability to move bullion out of the key trading hub.】

item.title: 海湾地区投资公司为基金获得逾11亿美元承诺投资
item.description: 总部位于巴林的另类资产管理巨头英维斯集团（Investcorp）完成了一只收购私募投资公司少数股权的基金募集，该基金获得逾11亿美元承诺资金。这是海湾地区最新一笔在地区冲突升级背景下仍持续推进的交易。【原文：Bahrain-based alternative asset management giant Investcorp closed a fund that buys minority stakes in private investment firms, drawing commitments of over $1.1 billion in the latest Gulf deal to continue despite escalating conflict in the region.】

item.title: 伊朗战争冲击天然气供应，印度面临酷暑难耐的夏夜
item.description: 今年夏天，印度正经历酷热难耐的夜晚。中东地区的冲突导致天然气供应受阻，这可能削减晚间为家庭制冷的关键电力来源。【原文：India is facing sweltering nights this summer as conflict in the Middle East crimps natural gas supply, which could curtail electricity generation from a key source used to cool homes during the evening.】

item.title: 研究显示，仿制版Ozempic每月费用可能低于3美元
item.description: 一项新研究显示，诺和诺德公司畅销产品Ozempic和Wegovy的仿制药每月售价可能低于3美元，这凸显了仿制药在推动强效减肥药全球普及方面的潜力。【原文：Generic versions of Novo Nordisk A/S’s hit shots Ozempic and Wegovy could be sold for under $3 a month, a new study showed, underscoring their potential to unlock global access to powerful weight-loss drugs.】

item.title: 美国给予印度临时豁免后，信实工业寻求俄罗斯石油
item.description: 知情人士透露，在获得美国临时进口许可后，信实工业有限公司正寻求采购俄罗斯原油。【原文：Reliance Industries Ltd. is seeking to buy Russian oil after the US granted India a license to temporarily acquire cargoes, according to a person familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 欧洲股市或创四月以来最大单周跌幅，因伊朗战争风险升温
item.description: 欧洲股市本周跌幅或创四月以来最大，因伊朗局势未见缓和迹象。【原文：European shares headed for their worst weekly decline since April as the war in Iran showed no sign of nearing a resolution.】

item.title: KKR寻求5亿美元贷款收购学校运营商XCL股权
item.description: 据知情人士透露，KKR & Co.正寻求一笔5亿美元的贷款，用于支持其收购教育运营商XCL Education Holdings Pte.的多数股权。【原文：KKR & Co. is seeking a $500 million loan to back its acquisition of a majority stake in school operator XCL Education Holdings Pte., according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 阿提哈德航空恢复商业航班，导弹威胁持续存在
item.description: 阿提哈德航空正准备重启飞往约70个目的地的航班，此前这家中东最大航空公司之一经历了近一周的全面停运。【原文：Etihad Airways is preparing to restart flights to around 70 destinations after almost a week of complete shutdown for one of the Middle East’s largest carriers.】

item.title: 日本央行4月加息概率五五开，前官员称伊朗事件后
item.description: 日本央行前执行董事、货币政策主管表示，尽管伊朗局势引发新的不确定性，但该行下月仍存在50%的可能性上调基准利率——此前该行在3月维持利率不变。【原文：There is still a 50% chance the Bank of Japan will raise its benchmark rate next month after a hold in March even after the conflict in Iran generated new uncertainties, according to a former BOJ executive director who oversaw monetary policy.】

item.title: 欧洲天然气价格创能源危机以来最大单周涨幅
item.description: 欧洲天然气价格有望创下能源危机以来最大单周涨幅，因中东战事持续笼罩全球天然气供应前景。【原文：European natural gas prices are poised for their biggest weekly gain since the energy crisis as the war in the Middle East continues to cloud the outlook for global flows.】

item.title: 外资投资者失踪阻碍尼日利亚企业复兴计划
item.description: 尼日利亚一家鲜为人知的上市公司表示，其复苏计划因无法追踪最大股东下落而陷入停滞。【原文：A little known publicly traded company in Nigeria said its revival plan has stalled because it can’t trace its biggest shareholder.】

item.title: 防务公司Vincorion计划在法兰克福上市，销售额持续攀升
item.description: 德国防务技术公司Vincorion计划在法兰克福上市，旨在借势日益动荡的世界局势下投资者对防务类股票的投资热情。【原文：German defense technology company Vincorion is planning to list in Frankfurt, looking to tap investor appetite for defense stocks in an increasingly unstable world.】

item.title: BMI称伊朗战争可能引发非洲货币贬值
item.description: 据惠誉解决方案公司旗下BMI机构称，中东冲突可能引发非洲新一轮货币贬值，因能源成本上涨限制了各国当局捍卫本国货币的能力。【原文：The conflict in the Middle East could spark another round of devaluations in Africa as rising energy costs limit authorities’ ability to defend their currencies, according to BMI, a unit of Fitch Solutions Inc.】

item.title: 哈利法克斯称英国房价再度攀升至历史新高
item.description: 英国房价在2月份再创新高，随后中东冲突的余波威胁到抵押贷款市场。【原文：UK house prices racked up another record high in February before the fallout from conflict in the Middle East threatened to disrupt the mortgage market.】

item.title: 股市有望反弹，结束动荡一周
中国市场应对伊朗战争动荡的表现优于亚洲其他市场
item.description: 在全球市场因伊朗战争引发抛售之际，中国市场表现优于其他亚洲市场。【原文：Chinese markets have held up better than their Asian peers during the global market selloff caused by the war in Iran.】

item.title: 辉瑞肥胖症药物获中国批准上市，仿制药压力渐增
item.description: 中国已批准辉瑞公司一款新型肥胖症治疗药物，加剧了该市场的竞争态势。随着仿制药即将进入市场，该领域竞争将愈发激烈。【原文：China has approved a new obesity treatment from Pfizer Inc., heightening competition in a market poised to become even more crowded with the looming entry of generics.】

item.title: 特朗普团队淡化财政部石油期货交易，油价持续飙升
item.description: 据知情人士透露，特朗普政府目前暂不考虑动用财政部进行石油期货交易，因政府官员正密切关注伊朗战争期间攀升的能源价格走势。【原文：The Trump administration is ruling out deploying the Treasury Department to trade oil futures for now, according to a person familiar with the matter, as government officials look tame energy prices that have climbed amid the Iran war.】

item.title: 南非新出口枢纽项目引发锰业巨头竞标热潮
item.description: 南非锰矿石主要生产商——作为全球最大的钢铁原料生产国——计划竞标位于东南沿海恩古拉港的新出口码头。【原文：Top producers of manganese ore in South Africa, the world’s biggest producer of the steelmaking ingredient, intend to bid for a new export terminal at the southeastern port of Ngqura.】
